name: Chinese Barbecued Ribs
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup minced scallion, including green tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the marinade ingredients in a small saucepan.
2. Simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Cool and pour the marinade over the ribs.
4. Marinate for at least 1 hour.
5. Cook on grill, basting with reserved marinade only during the last half hour of cooking.
